# Nicole James · Downtown Austin Condo Specialist

> Nicole James is a licensed Texas real estate agent (TREC #549414) and Christie's International Real Estate Luxury Specialist based in Austin. Since 2007 she has maintained a specialty practice in downtown Austin condominium towers — buyer representation, seller representation, and off-market advisory — with over 90 units sold at Bridges on The Park alone. Resident of 5th & West Residences, downtown Austin. Brokerage: @properties Lone Star / Christie's International Real Estate.

## About

- [About Nicole James](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/about.html): Nineteen-year downtown Austin specialty practice, three-time Austin Business Journal Top 50 nominee (2011, 2012, 2014), Christie's Luxury Specialist since 2020, @properties Lone Star brokerage. Education: University of Houston.

## Services & Buildings

- [Services overview](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/services.html): Seller representation, buyer representation, and off-market advisory across 30+ downtown Austin buildings — from Bridges on The Park and The Independent to The Austonian, Four Seasons Residences, 70 Rainey, Fifth & West, and beyond.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/blog/): Market intelligence on downtown Austin condominium pricing, HOA fees, and building-specific trends.
- [HOA Fees, Compared](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/blog/hoa-fees-compared.html): What residents in five downtown Austin buildings actually pay each month.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://nicolejamesaustin.com/contact.html): Phone 512·466·4608, email nicolej@christiesrealestatels.com, office at 1105 N. Lamar Blvd Suite 100, Austin TX 78703. Messages go to Nicole directly; one business day response.

## Memberships

- Austin Board of REALTORS · Texas REALTORS · National Association of REALTORS · Downtown Austin Neighborhood Association
